message:
feat(mysql): Implement full TLS support using rustls

Adds complete TLS/SSL support for MySQL connections via the rustls library.

**New TlsStream implementation (feature-gated):**
- Generic wrapper over Read+Write streams with rustls encryption
- Supports all MySQL SSL modes: Disable, Preferred, Required, VerifyCa,
  VerifyIdentity
- Proper SNI (Server Name Indication) support
- Certificate verification with configurable trust anchors

**TlsConfig struct:**
- ssl_mode field for connection security level
- Optional CA certificate path for server verification
- Optional client cert/key for mutual TLS
- accept_invalid_certs flag for development/testing
- Server name override capability

**Key implementation details:**
- TLS handshake performed after MySQL initial handshake as per protocol
- Implements Read/Write traits for transparent encryption
- Protocol version and handshake state exposed for debugging
- Feature-gated behind "tls" feature to keep core library lean:
  sqlmodel-mysql = { version = "0.1", features = ["tls"] }

**Dependencies added:**
- rustls (TLS implementation)
- webpki-roots (Mozilla's CA certificates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,6 +14,8 @@ workspace = true
 [features]
 default = []
 console = ["dep:sqlmodel-console"]
+# TLS support via rustls
+tls = ["dep:rustls", "dep:webpki-roots", "dep:rustls-pemfile"]
 
 [dependencies]
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
@@ -27,4 +29,9 @@ rand = "0.8"
 # Optional console support
 sqlmodel-console = { path = "../sqlmodel-console", optional = true }
 
+# Optional TLS support
+rustls = { version = "0.23", optional = true, default-features = false, features = ["std", "tls12", "ring"] }
+webpki-roots = { version = "0.26", optional = true }
+rustls-pemfile = { version = "2.2", optional = true }
+
 [dev-dependencies]
